data_description.weather_entity: Weather integration providing outdoor temperature and wind speed (e.g. weather.home, weather.meteo_france).

error.weather_incompatible: Weather entity does not support forecasts
error.invalid_time_sequence: Heating stop hour must precede target hour

data_description.name: Integration name
data_description.weather_entity: Weather integration providing outdoor temperature and wind speed (e.g. weather.home, weather.meteo_france).
data_description.cool_mode_enabled: Enable automatic pre-cooling to reach target sleep temperature
data_description.sleep_hour: Bedtime — the AC stops learning at this hour (e.g. 22:00)
data_description.coolcalc_hour: Time when cool recovery is calculated each evening (e.g. 18:00)

cool.title: Cool Recovery Configuration
cool.description: Configure cool recovery parameters for pre-cooling your home before bedtime

data_description.cool_mode_enabled: Enable automatic pre-cooling to reach target sleep temperature
data_description.sleep_hour: Bedtime — the AC stops learning at this hour (e.g. 22:00)
data_description.coolcalc_hour: Time when cool recovery is calculated each evening (e.g. 18:00)

calculate_recovery_time.name: Calculate Recovery Time
calculate_recovery_time.description: Calculates the heating recovery start time based on thermal parameters.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID (optional, uses first available if not specified).

calculate_recovery_update_time.name: Calculate Recovery Update Time
calculate_recovery_update_time.description: Calculates when the next recovery time update should occur.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID (optional, uses first available if not specified).

calculate_rcth_fast.name: Calculate RCth Fast
calculate_rcth_fast.description: Calculates the dynamic evolution of RCth before the recovery starts.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID (optional, uses first available if not specified).

on_heating_stop.name: On Heating Stop
on_heating_stop.description: Triggers actions when heating stops (records temperatures and timestamps for calculations).

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID (optional, uses first available if not specified).

on_recovery_start.name: On Recovery Start
on_recovery_start.description: Triggers actions at the start of heating recovery (records temperatures and calculates RCth).

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID (optional, uses first available if not specified).

on_recovery_end.name: On Recovery End
on_recovery_end.description: Triggers actions at the end of heating recovery (records temperatures and calculates RPth).

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID (optional, uses first available if not specified).

reset_learning.name: Reset Learning
reset_learning.description: Resets all learned thermal coefficients (RCth, RPth) to their default values.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID (optional, uses first available if not specified).

trigger_calculation.name: Trigger Calculation
trigger_calculation.description: Manually triggers an immediate recalculation of the recovery time.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID (optional, uses first available if not specified).

start_cool_recovery.name: Start Cool Recovery
start_cool_recovery.description: Manually starts the cool recovery (turns on AC and begins measurement phase).

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID (optional, uses first available if not specified).

end_cool_recovery.name: End Cool Recovery
end_cool_recovery.description: Manually ends the cool recovery, records temperatures and updates RPcu coefficient.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID (optional, uses first available if not specified).

reset_cool_learning.name: Reset Cool Learning
reset_cool_learning.description: Resets all learned cool coefficients (RCcu, RPcu) to their default values.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID (optional, uses first available if not specified).
